questions.question: What is the main difference between a process and a thread, in the context of handling deadlocks?
questions.hint: Process has a separate memory space, while a thread shares the same memory space.

questions.question: What is the purpose of the 'zechstein algorithm' in resolving deadlocks?
questions.hint: The algorithm involves choosing a process to terminate and then attempting to roll back the transaction.
